action: Fetched the latest headlines for each genre (Politics, Business, Sports, Breaking News, and Weather) using search queries and generated a short narration script for each, suitable for news recaps.
fallback_action: If search headline fetching is unavailable, prompt the user to input headlines for each genre.

recipe.steps: For each news genre (Politics, Business, Sports, Breaking News, Weather), initiate a search query to collect the latest headlines relevant to the topic from Google or available headline sources.
Summarize the latest headlines into a brief, easy-to-understand narration script. Format each like: 'Here’s your quick update on [genre name]: [headline details].'

can_perform_without_user_input: no-I need either access to headline-fetching/search tools or the headlines must be provided by the user.
